node.statement: RESULT E8 (Physical gap conversion): Delta_phys(B) = Delta_dimless * E_C where Coulomb energy scale E_C = e^2/(4*pi*eps_0*eps_r*ell_B) with ell_B = sqrt(hbar/(eB)) in SI units. Numerically: E_C/k_B ~ 50.8*sqrt(B[T]) Kelvin for GaAs (eps_r=12.9). At B=10T: E_C ~ 160K, so Delta(nu=1/3) ~ 0.1036*160 ~ 16.6K. JULIA: landau.jl computes this conversion.
